heading: Criminal forfeiture
label: 1834 Criminal forfeiture
text: Forfeiture, destruction, and restitution relating to this chapter shall be subject to section 2323, to the extent provided in that section, in addition to any other similar remedies provided by law.
notes: Amendments2008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to forfeiture of property either derived from or used to commit a violation of this chapter.Pub. L. 110–403
amendments: Amendments2008— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, section related to forfeiture of property either derived from or used to commit a violation of this chapter.Pub. L. 110–403
